title: Three-seed RealMLP equal average
summary: Extend the two-seed RealMLP parent to a three-seed equal-weight average without changing model parameters.
rationale: The two-seed average is a confirmed positive signal. The next clean scaling test is whether adding a third independent RealMLP seed continues to reduce variance enough to improve AUC.
implementation_hint: Start from the parent two-seed RealMLP average code. Add exactly one additional RealMLP expert with the same configuration, features, folds, and preprocessing but a new random seed. Average all three OOF/test probability vectors equally. Do not change n_ens, epochs, features, or add any non-RealMLP expert.
expected_effect: Improve OOF AUC if a third seed contributes independent useful variance.
risk: The third seed may be highly correlated with the existing two seeds and only increase runtime.
